codeReview.summary: Re-review failed. The two prior blocking issues both remain in the current repository state, and there have been no Nix-related changes since the prior review: `git diff a5a0f36..HEAD -- flake.nix nix .factory/library` is empty. The current `flake.nix` still filters out Go source directories before `buildGoModule` runs, and the frontend derivation still performs `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile` during a normal sandboxed Nix build.

issues.description: Prior blocking issue remains. `commonGoArgs.src` uses `pkgs.lib.cleanSourceWith`, but the filter at lines 21-26 only keeps `.go`, `go.mod`, and `go.sum` paths and never keeps directories such as `cmd/` or `internal/`. That means the source tree handed to `buildGoModule` does not preserve the service package directories required by `subPackages = [ subPackage ]`, so the Go package builds are not actually deployable.

Prior blocking issue remains. The frontend derivation still runs `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile` in `postPatch`. Normal Nix builds are sandboxed and do not allow the network access that install step requires, so the frontend package is not reproducibly buildable for deployment. This still needs a Nix-native dependency fetch path such as `buildNpmPackage` or a pre-fetched pnpm store.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The infra-worker skill says workers must read `.factory/library/environment.md`, but this worker session did not do that even though the handoff says `followedProcedure: true`.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/infra-worker/SKILL.md requires reading `.factory/library/environment.md` in Work Procedure step 2; `/Users/wiz/.factory/missions/3e8a6c24-23d0-4061-8dd3-92d26bab1fa5/worker-transcripts.jsonl` has no `environment.md` access for session `a8de6804-99b5-45da-8f20-011f8a2a912d`; the handoff file records `skillFeedback.followedProcedure` as true.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The handoff `commitId` still points to the later documentation-only commit instead of the implementation commit, so the prescribed review flow begins from the wrong diff unless the reviewer notices and pivots to the earlier implementation commit.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `/Users/wiz/.factory/missions/3e8a6c24-23d0-4061-8dd3-92d26bab1fa5/handoffs/2026-04-10T19-57-27-702Z__nixos-config__a8de6804-99b5-45da-8f20-011f8a2a912d.json` records `commitId: a5a0f36`; `git show --stat a5a0f36` changes only `.factory/library/nixos-config.md`, while `git show --stat b3d8fb6` contains the actual `flake.nix` and `nix/*.nix` implementation.

summary: Fresh review against current HEAD still fails. Prior blocking issue 1 (the `cleanSourceWith` Go source filter) remains, prior blocking issue 2 (networked `pnpm install` inside the frontend Nix build) remains, and no Nix-related changes have landed since the earlier review.
